feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Natalie Portman And Serena Williams Invest In LA Soccer Team

link.title: Natalie Portman And Serena Williams Invest In LA Soccer Team

entry.content:
Serena Williams and her daughter Alexis Olympia Ohanian are part of a group that will own the newest soccer team in the U.S.
According to CNN, Natalie Portman is also part of the majority woman founded group.
The National Women’s Soccer League announced that Los Angeles will be home to the franchise, The Angel City group.
Portman said in a statement; "I am thrilled by the opportunity to partner with this incredible group of people".
Other investors include Kara Nortman, Julie Uhrman and Alexis Ohanian, Williams’ husband.
The franchise will join the league in the spring of 2022.
entry.summary: Serena Williams and her daughter Alexis Olympia Ohanian are part of a group that will own the newest soccer team in the U.S. According to CNN, Natalie Portman is also part of the majority woman founded group. The National Women’s Soccer League announced that Los Angeles will be home to the franchise, The Angel City group. Portman said in a statement; "I am thrilled by the opportunity to partner with this incredible group of people". Other investors include Kara Nortman, Julie Uhrman and Alexis Ohanian, Williams’ husband. The franchise will join the league in the spring of 2022.

entry.title: Ram Mandir शिलान्यास समारोह की भव्य तैयारी, PM Modi समेत ये दिग्गज रहेंगे मौजूद ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Ram Mandir शिलान्यास समारोह की भव्य तैयारी, PM Modi समेत ये दिग्गज रहेंगे मौजूद ! वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi and a host of other VIPs, including Maharashtra Chief Minister Uddhav Thackeray and his Bihar counterpart Nitish Kumar, will attend the ground-breaking ceremony for the Ram temple in Ayodhya on August 5, the temple trust said. Grand preparations are on the ceremony, which will revolve around the installation of a 40 kg silver brick as the foundation stone by the Prime Minister, said the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teertha Kshetra, which has been tasked with the temple building.
अयोध्या में पांच अगस्त को राम मंदिर के भूमि पूजन के लिए भव्य तैयारियां चल रही हैं. राम जन्मभूमि तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्ट के मुताबिक, प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी भूमि पूजन करेंगे. हालांकि, प्रधानमंत्री कार्यलाय की ओर से अभी इसकी पुष्टि नहीं की गई है. राम मंदिर का भूमि-पूजन अभिजीत मुहूर्त में ‘सर्वार्थ सिद्धि योग’ किया जाएगा. ताम्र कलश में गंगाजल और अन्य तीर्थों का जल लाकर पूजा की जाएगी. 3 अगस्त से पूजा-पाठ का काम शुरू हो जाएगा. माना जाता है कि अभिजीत मुहूर्त में भगवान राम का जन्म हुआ था. यूपी के मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ भी भूमि-पूजन में शामिल होंगे.
#Ayodhya #RamMandir #PMModi #oneindiaHindi
entry.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and a host of other VIPs, including Maharashtra Chief Minister Uddhav Thackeray and his Bihar counterpart Nitish Kumar, will attend the ground-breaking ceremony for the Ram temple in Ayodhya on August 5, the temple trust said. Grand preparations are on the ceremony, which will revolve around the installation of a 40 kg silver brick as the foundation stone by the Prime Minister, said the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teertha Kshetra, which has been tasked with the temple building. अयोध्या में पांच अगस्त को राम मंदिर के भूमि पूजन के लिए भव्य तैयारियां चल रही हैं. राम जन्मभूमि तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्ट के मुताबिक, प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी भूमि पूजन करेंगे. हालांकि, प्रधानमंत्री कार्यलाय की ओर से अभी इसकी पुष्टि नहीं की गई है. राम मंदिर का भूमि-पूजन अभिजीत मुहूर्त में ‘सर्वार्थ सिद्धि योग’ किया जाएगा. ताम्र कलश में गंगाजल और अन्य तीर्थों का जल लाकर पूजा की जाएगी. 3 अगस्त से पूजा-पाठ का काम शुरू हो जाएगा. माना जाता है कि अभिजीत मुहूर्त में भगवान राम का जन्म हुआ था. यूपी के मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ भी भूमि-पूजन में शामिल होंगे. #Ayodhya #RamMandir #PMModi #oneindiaHindi

entry.title: Caught on Cam: Brutality of Madhya Pradesh police

link.title: Caught on Cam: Brutality of Madhya Pradesh police

entry.content: A couple in Guna, Madhya Pradesh drank pesticides in front of police when a team of local administration bulldozed their crops in a bid to remove encroachment on government land.Madhya Pradesh Chief Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan has removed the Collector and Superintendent of Police of Guna after a purported video of the incident went viral. Watch this heart-wrenching video.
entry.summary: A couple in Guna, Madhya Pradesh drank pesticides in front of police when a team of local administration bulldozed their crops in a bid to remove encroachment on government land.Madhya Pradesh Chief Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan has removed the Collector and Superintendent of Police of Guna after a purported video of the incident went viral. Watch this heart-wrenching video.

entry.title: Shoppers in Sunderland city centre on the day face masks become mandatory in shops

link.title: Shoppers in Sunderland city centre on the day face masks become mandatory in shops

entry.content: Shoppers in Sunderland city centre on July 24 2020, the day face masks become mandatory in shops in England
entry.summary: Shoppers in Sunderland city centre on July 24 2020, the day face masks become mandatory in shops in England

entry.title: बारां में आईसीआईसीआई बैंक से दिनदहाड़े लाखों रुपए से भरा बैग पार, मचा हड़कम्प

link.title: बारां में आईसीआईसीआई बैंक से दिनदहाड़े लाखों रुपए से भरा बैग पार, मचा हड़कम्प

entry.content:
बारां में आईसीआईसीआई बैंक से दिनदहाड़े लाखों रुपए से भरा बैग पार, मचा हड़कम्प
बारां. आईसीआईसीआई बैंक मे 31.50 लाख रूपए से भरे बैग को पार करने का सीसीटीवी फुटेज।
entry.summary: बारां में आईसीआईसीआई बैंक से दिनदहाड़े लाखों रुपए से भरा बैग पार, मचा हड़कम्प बारां. आईसीआईसीआई बैंक मे 31.50 लाख रूपए से भरे बैग को पार करने का सीसीटीवी फुटेज।

entry.title: After Midnight Trailer Deutsch German (2020)

link.title: After Midnight Trailer Deutsch German (2020)

entry.content:
After Midnight Trailer Deutsch German (Aaron Moorhead, Justin Benson, David Lawson Jr. - OT: After Midnight)
▶ Abonniere uns!
Kinostart: 16.07.2020
Blu-ray/DVD Release: 29.05.2020
VOD-Start: 14.05.2020
Alle Infos:
Like uns auf Facebook:
Folge uns auf Twitter:
Abonniere uns bei Instagram:
Nichts mehr verpassen mit unserem kostenlosen Messenger Abo:
Ganzer Film bei Amazon:
Für Hank geht gerade ein wenig die Welt unter. Dass ihn seine Freundin Abby nach all den Jahren so plötzlich verlässt, damit hätte er nie gerechnet. Aber den Horror hat Hank erst noch vor sich. Trailer zum Horrorthriller After Midnight.Inhalt: Für Hank (Jeremy Gardner) geht gerade ein wenig die Welt unter. Dass ihn seine Freundin Abby (Brea Grant) nach all den Jahren so plötzlich verlässt, damit hätte er nie gerechnet. Schließlich waren sie doch immer so glücklich! Oder etwa nicht? Was ist da nur schief gelaufen? Richtig viel Zeit, um über all das nachzudenken, hat er jedoch nicht. Schließlich ist da noch dieses Monster, das seine volle Aufmerksamkeit erfordert. Richtig gesehen hat er es noch nicht, dafür schon oft gehört, wenn es vor dem Haus herumstreicht und Spuren seiner scharfen Krallen hinterlässt. Glauben will ihm jedoch niemand, nicht einmal Abby. Und so bleibt dem passionierten Jäger wohl nichts anderes übrig, als die Kreatur selbst auszuschalten …Schauspieler: Jeremy Gardner, Henry Zebrowski, Brea Grant, Justin Benson, Ashley Song, Nicola Masciotra
entry.summary: After Midnight Trailer Deutsch German (Aaron Moorhead, Justin Benson, David Lawson Jr. - OT: After Midnight) ▶ Abonniere uns! Kinostart: 16.07.2020 Blu-ray/DVD Release: 29.05.2020 VOD-Start: 14.05.2020 Alle Infos: Like uns auf Facebook: Folge uns auf Twitter: Abonniere uns bei Instagram: Nichts mehr verpassen mit unserem kostenlosen Messenger Abo: Ganzer Film bei Amazon: Für Hank geht gerade ein wenig die Welt unter. Dass ihn seine Freundin Abby nach all den Jahren so plötzlich verlässt, damit hätte er nie gerechnet. Aber den Horror hat Hank erst noch vor sich. Trailer zum Horrorthriller After Midnight.Inhalt: Für Hank (Jeremy Gardner) geht gerade ein wenig die Welt unter. Dass ihn seine Freundin Abby (Brea Grant) nach all den Jahren so plötzlich verlässt, damit hätte er nie gerechnet. Schließlich waren sie doch immer so glücklich! Oder etwa nicht? Was ist da nur schief gelaufen? Richtig viel Zeit, um über all das nachzudenken, hat er jedoch nicht. Schließlich ist da noch dieses Monster, das seine volle Aufmerksamkeit erfordert. Richtig gesehen hat er es noch nicht, dafür schon oft gehört, wenn es vor dem Haus herumstreicht und Spuren seiner scharfen Krallen hinterlässt. Glauben will ihm jedoch niemand, nicht einmal Abby. Und so bleibt dem passionierten Jäger wohl nichts anderes übrig, als die Kreatur selbst auszuschalten …Schauspieler: Jeremy Gardner, Henry Zebrowski, Brea Grant, Justin Benson, Ashley Song, Nicola Masciotra

entry.title: Guy Accidentally Lands on Rock While Cliff Diving

link.title: Guy Accidentally Lands on Rock While Cliff Diving

entry.content: I would change the first sentence. We can say, This guy went cliff diving with his friends near a river. However, he miscalculated the distance to the water while jumping off the cliff. He landed on his feet on a rock and bounced into the water.
entry.summary: I would change the first sentence. We can say, This guy went cliff diving with his friends near a river. However, he miscalculated the distance to the water while jumping off the cliff. He landed on his feet on a rock and bounced into the water.

entry.title: Portrait de Camille Colbus, DG de Too Good To Go

link.title: Portrait de Camille Colbus, DG de Too Good To Go

entry.content: Camille Colbus est directrice générale adjointe de Too Good To Go, une entreprise luttant contre le gaspillage alimentaire. Voici son portrait.
entry.summary: Camille Colbus est directrice générale adjointe de Too Good To Go, une entreprise luttant contre le gaspillage alimentaire. Voici son portrait.

entry.title: Rajendra Prasad Launches Zoono Z71 Microbe Sheid Surface Sanitizer

link.title: Rajendra Prasad Launches Zoono Z71 Microbe Sheid Surface Sanitizer

entry.content:
Zoono Z71 Microbe Shield Surface Sanitiser Launch By Dr Rajendra Prasad
#Covid19
#Coronavirus #Sanitizer #RajendraPrasad
#Hyderabad
#Telangana
#Andhrapradesh
#RajendraPrasad
#tollywood
ప్రముఖ నటుడు నట కిరీటి ఓ కొత్త సనేటైసర్ లాంచ్ చేసారు. దాని పేరే జూనో z71 మైక్రో బ్ షీల్డ్ సర్ఫెస్ సనేటైజార్. ఇది గానక వాడితే కరోనా వైరస్ అసలు రాదు అని జాగ్రత్త గా ఉండవచ్చు అని రాజేంద్ర ప్రసాద్ అన్నారు.
entry.summary: Zoono Z71 Microbe Shield Surface Sanitiser Launch By Dr Rajendra Prasad #Covid19 #Coronavirus #Sanitizer #RajendraPrasad #Hyderabad #Telangana #Andhrapradesh #RajendraPrasad #tollywood ప్రముఖ నటుడు నట కిరీటి ఓ కొత్త సనేటైసర్ లాంచ్ చేసారు. దాని పేరే జూనో z71 మైక్రో బ్ షీల్డ్ సర్ఫెస్ సనేటైజార్. ఇది గానక వాడితే కరోనా వైరస్ అసలు రాదు అని జాగ్రత్త గా ఉండవచ్చు అని రాజేంద్ర ప్రసాద్ అన్నారు.

entry.title: Giant whale washes up on Indonesian beach

link.title: Giant whale washes up on Indonesian beach

entry.content:
A giant 23-metre (75-foot) whale briefly washed up near a beach in Indonesia but it was unclear how the enormous marine mammal died, a conservation official said Wednesday, July 22.
Read:
entry.summary: A giant 23-metre (75-foot) whale briefly washed up near a beach in Indonesia but it was unclear how the enormous marine mammal died, a conservation official said Wednesday, July 22. Read:

entry.title: Monaco - Kovač : ‘Je dois améliorer ma connaissance sur certains clubs de L1’

link.title: Monaco - Kovač : ‘Je dois améliorer ma connaissance sur certains clubs de L1’

entry.content: S’il connaît l’équipe de France et les grands clubs de Ligue 1, Niko Kovač, le nouvel entraîneur de l’AS Monaco, avoue ne pas tout connaître du championnat de France.
entry.summary: S’il connaît l’équipe de France et les grands clubs de Ligue 1, Niko Kovač, le nouvel entraîneur de l’AS Monaco, avoue ne pas tout connaître du championnat de France.

entry.title: GTA 5 _ Jewel Store Job - Gameplay (60 FPS)

link.title: GTA 5 _ Jewel Store Job - Gameplay (60 FPS)

entry.content:
Grand Theft Auto (GTA) is a series of action-adventure games created by David Jones and Mike Dailly.[2] Later titles were developed under the oversight of brothers Dan and Sam Houser, Leslie Benzies and Aaron Garbut. It is primarily developed by British development house Rockstar North (formerly DMA Design), and published by its parent company, Rockstar Games. The name of the series references the term "grand theft auto", used in the United States for motor vehicle theft.
Most games in the series are set in fictional locales modelled on cities, usually either Liberty City, Vice City or San Andreas, which are stand-ins for New York City, Miami and the state of California, respectively. The first game encompassed three fictional cities, while subsequent titles tend to emphasise a single setting. Gameplay focuses on an open world where the player can choose missions to progress an overall story, as well as engaging in side activities, all consisting of action-adventure, driving, third-person shooting, carjacking, occasional role-playing, stealth and racing elements. The series focuses on many different protagonists who attempt to rise through the ranks of the criminal underworld, although their motives for doing so vary in each game. The series also has elements of the earlier beat ‘em up games from the 16-bit era. The antagonists are commonly characters who have betrayed the protagonist or his organisation, or characters who have the most impact impeding the protagonist’s progress. Film and music veterans have voiced characters, including Ray Liotta, Dennis Hopper, Samuel L. Jackson, James Woods, Debbie Harry, Axl Rose and Peter Fonda.[3]
DMA Design began the series in 1997, with the release of the Grand Theft Auto. As of 2019, the series has eleven stand-alone games and four expansion packs. The third main title, Grand Theft Auto III, is considered a landmark game, as it brought the series to a three-dimensional (3D) setting and more immersive experience. Subsequent titles have followed and built upon the concept established in Grand Theft Auto III, and received significant acclaim. They have influenced other open-world action games, and led to the label Grand Theft Auto clone on similar games.
The series has been critically acclaimed and commercially successful, having shipped more than 280 million units with an estimated gross revenue of over $9 billion.[4][5] Making it the fourth-highest selling video game franchise of all time, behind Nintendo’s Mario and Pokémon franchises,[6] and Tetris.[7] In 2006, Grand Theft Auto was featured in a list of British design icons in the Great British Design Quest organised by the BBC and the Design Museum.[8] In 2013, The Telegraph ranked Grand Theft Auto among Britain’s most successful exports.[9] The series has also been controversial for its adult nature and violent themes.
entry.summary: Grand Theft Auto (GTA) is a series of action-adventure games created by David Jones and Mike Dailly.[2] Later titles were developed under the oversight of brothers Dan and Sam Houser, Leslie Benzies and Aaron Garbut. It is primarily developed by British development house Rockstar North (formerly DMA Design), and published by its parent company, Rockstar Games. The name of the series references the term "grand theft auto", used in the United States for motor vehicle theft. Most games in the series are set in fictional locales modelled on cities, usually either Liberty City, Vice City or San Andreas, which are stand-ins for New York City, Miami and the state of California, respectively. The first game encompassed three fictional cities, while subsequent titles tend to emphasise a single setting. Gameplay focuses on an open world where the player can choose missions to progress an overall story, as well as engaging in side activities, all consisting of action-adventure, driving, third-person shooting, carjacking, occasional role-playing, stealth and racing elements. The series focuses on many different protagonists who attempt to rise through the ranks of the criminal underworld, although their motives for doing so vary in each game. The series also has elements of the earlier beat ‘em up games from the 16-bit era. The antagonists are commonly characters who have betrayed the protagonist or his organisation, or characters who have the most impact impeding the protagonist’s progress. Film and music veterans have voiced characters, including Ray Liotta, Dennis Hopper, Samuel L. Jackson, James Woods, Debbie Harry, Axl Rose and Peter Fonda.[3] DMA Design began the series in 1997, with the release of the Grand Theft Auto. As of 2019, the series has eleven stand-alone games and four expansion packs. The third main title, Grand Theft Auto III, is considered a landmark game, as it brought the series to a three-dimensional (3D) setting and more immersive experience. Subsequent titles have followed and built upon the concept established in Grand Theft Auto III, and received significant acclaim. They have influenced other open-world action games, and led to the label Grand Theft Auto clone on similar games. The series has been critically acclaimed and commercially successful, having shipped more than 280 million units with an estimated gross revenue of over $9 billion.[4][5] Making it the fourth-highest selling video game franchise of all time, behind Nintendo’s Mario and Pokémon franchises,[6] and Tetris.[7] In 2006, Grand Theft Auto was featured in a list of British design icons in the Great British Design Quest organised by the BBC and the Design Museum.[8] In 2013, The Telegraph ranked Grand Theft Auto among Britain’s most successful exports.[9] The series has also been controversial for its adult nature and violent themes.

entry.title: Immune system treatment to reduce stress can prevent cancer metastases, study explains

link.title: Immune system treatment to reduce stress can prevent cancer metastases, study explains

entry.content: A new approach from Tel Aviv University can save the lives of cancer patients! Researchers have found that the short time period around tumour removal surgery (the weeks before and after surgery) is critical for the prevention of metastases development, which develops when the body is under stress. According to the University researchers, patients require immunotherapeutic treatment as well as treatment to reduce inflammation and physical and psychological stress. The research was conducted by Prof. Shamgar Ben-Eliyahu of TAU’s School of Psychological Sciences and Sagol School of Neuroscience and Prof. Oded Zmora from Assaf Harofe Medical Center. The research results were published in the journal Cancer. Immunotherapeutic treatment is a medical treatment that activates the immune system. One such treatment is the injection of substances with similar receptors to those of viruses and bacteria into the patient’s body. The immune system recognizes them as a threat and activates itself, thus preventing metastatic disease. Prof. Ben-Eliyahu explains that surgery for the removal of the primary tumour is a mainstay in cancer treatment. But the risk of developing metastases after surgery is estimated at 10 per cent among breast cancer patients, at 20-40 per cent among colorectal cancer patients, and at 80 per cent among pancreatic cancer patients.
entry.summary: A new approach from Tel Aviv University can save the lives of cancer patients! Researchers have found that the short time period around tumour removal surgery (the weeks before and after surgery) is critical for the prevention of metastases development, which develops when the body is under stress. According to the University researchers, patients require immunotherapeutic treatment as well as treatment to reduce inflammation and physical and psychological stress. The research was conducted by Prof. Shamgar Ben-Eliyahu of TAU’s School of Psychological Sciences and Sagol School of Neuroscience and Prof. Oded Zmora from Assaf Harofe Medical Center. The research results were published in the journal Cancer. Immunotherapeutic treatment is a medical treatment that activates the immune system. One such treatment is the injection of substances with similar receptors to those of viruses and bacteria into the patient’s body. The immune system recognizes them as a threat and activates itself, thus preventing metastatic disease. Prof. Ben-Eliyahu explains that surgery for the removal of the primary tumour is a mainstay in cancer treatment. But the risk of developing metastases after surgery is estimated at 10 per cent among breast cancer patients, at 20-40 per cent among colorectal cancer patients, and at 80 per cent among pancreatic cancer patients.

entry.title: These Are The Closest Images Ever Taken Of The Sun

link.title: These Are The Closest Images Ever Taken Of The Sun

entry.content: The closest images ever taken of the sun have been unveiled by NASA and the European Space Agency (ESA), unveiling omnipresent miniature solar flares, dubbed “campfires.” Data collected from NASA and the European Space Agency’s seven-year mission will help scientists unlock the secrets to some of the most puzzling mysteries about the object at the center of our solar system.
entry.summary: The closest images ever taken of the sun have been unveiled by NASA and the European Space Agency (ESA), unveiling omnipresent miniature solar flares, dubbed “campfires.” Data collected from NASA and the European Space Agency’s seven-year mission will help scientists unlock the secrets to some of the most puzzling mysteries about the object at the center of our solar system.

entry.title: Erick Thohir Tagih Utang Pemerintah Senilai Rp 113 Triliun Lebih

link.title: Erick Thohir Tagih Utang Pemerintah Senilai Rp 113 Triliun Lebih

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Menteri BUMN Erick Thohir menagih utang pemerintah terhadap tujuh perusahaan BUMN yang bernilai lebih dari Rp 113 triliun.
Kebutuhan dana ini dinilai sangat urgent untuk memberikan layanan publik saat pandemi virus corona atau Covid-19 ini.
Pemerintah memiliki utang terhadap tujuh perusahaan BUMN. Dan utang terbesar adalah pada PLN senilai Rp 48.36 triliun.
Sisanya, yakni kepada Pertamina, BUMN karya, Pupuk Indonesia, Kimia Farma, Perum Bulog, dan Kereta Api Indonesia.
Kondisi ini disampaikan langsung Menteri BUMN Erick Thohir dalam rapat kerja bersama Komisi VI DPR.
Menteri Erick Thohir menyinggung soal besarnya kontribusi BUMN ke pemerintah.
Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Menteri BUMN Erick Thohir menagih utang pemerintah terhadap tujuh perusahaan BUMN yang bernilai lebih dari Rp 113 triliun. Kebutuhan dana ini dinilai sangat urgent untuk memberikan layanan publik saat pandemi virus corona atau Covid-19 ini. Pemerintah memiliki utang terhadap tujuh perusahaan BUMN. Dan utang terbesar adalah pada PLN senilai Rp 48.36 triliun. Sisanya, yakni kepada Pertamina, BUMN karya, Pupuk Indonesia, Kimia Farma, Perum Bulog, dan Kereta Api Indonesia. Kondisi ini disampaikan langsung Menteri BUMN Erick Thohir dalam rapat kerja bersama Komisi VI DPR. Menteri Erick Thohir menyinggung soal besarnya kontribusi BUMN ke pemerintah. Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.

entry.title: My Day With Cosmo: How I’m Running My Clothing Business During A Pandemic

link.title: My Day With Cosmo: How I’m Running My Clothing Business During A Pandemic

entry.content: My Day with Cosmo: Samantha Dizon, the founder of fashion social enterprise Candid Clothing, talks about her #dailyroutine and how she runs her clothing business during a pandemic.
entry.summary: My Day with Cosmo: Samantha Dizon, the founder of fashion social enterprise Candid Clothing, talks about her #dailyroutine and how she runs her clothing business during a pandemic.

entry.title: Black Barbershops And Hair Salons On Why Their Businesses Are Unique Community Hubs

link.title: Black Barbershops And Hair Salons On Why Their Businesses Are Unique Community Hubs

entry.content: Where socialising in pubs is an important working class British tradition, Black barbershops and hair salons have long-been revered as safe spaces for people to convene and really be seen in more ways than one. These black hair styling business owners talk about what it means to be open after Covid-19 lockdown and why they are unique community hubs.
entry.summary: Where socialising in pubs is an important working class British tradition, Black barbershops and hair salons have long-been revered as safe spaces for people to convene and really be seen in more ways than one. These black hair styling business owners talk about what it means to be open after Covid-19 lockdown and why they are unique community hubs.

entry.title: One Direction streamed 8.8 billion times as they celebrate tenth anniversary

link.title: One Direction streamed 8.8 billion times as they celebrate tenth anniversary

entry.content:
One Direction fans have streamed the band’s tracks over 8.8 billion times in the last 10 years.
One Direction streamed 8.8 billion times as they celebrate tenth anniversary
One Direction streamed 8.8 billion times as they celebrate tenth anniversary
One Direction streamed 8.8 billion times as they celebrate tenth anniversary

entry.title: 15 Main Differences between Men and Women

link.title: 15 Main Differences between Men and Women

entry.content: Often people state that men and women are from various planets. We are not so much sure that it’s about planets, yet in all likelihood about structure and some different things. Ladies are not quite the same as men in numerous angles and a portion of these are even an added feature.
entry.summary: Often people state that men and women are from various planets. We are not so much sure that it’s about planets, yet in all likelihood about structure and some different things. Ladies are not quite the same as men in numerous angles and a portion of these are even an added feature.

entry.title: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan shifted to Nanavati Hospital for Covid-19 treatment Oneindia News

link.title: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan shifted to Nanavati Hospital for Covid-19 treatment Oneindia News

entry.content:
Aishwarya Rai Bachchan was shifted to Nanavati hospital for treatment after she developed mild fever du to Covid-19. She tested positive last week along with her husband Abhishek Bachchan and her father-in-law Amitabh Bachchan. Aishwarya and Abhishek’s daughter Aaradhya is also Covid positive.
#AishwaryaRai #Bachchan #Covid
entry.summary: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan was shifted to Nanavati hospital for treatment after she developed mild fever du to Covid-19. She tested positive last week along with her husband Abhishek Bachchan and her father-in-law Amitabh Bachchan. Aishwarya and Abhishek’s daughter Aaradhya is also Covid positive. #AishwaryaRai #Bachchan #Covid

entry.title: Vosges : des éleveurs perpétuent la transhumance

link.title: Vosges : des éleveurs perpétuent la transhumance

entry.content:
Sur le massif des Vosges, on défend la pratique agricole ancestrale de la transhumance. Les éleveurs alsaciens aimeraient bien la voir inscrite au patrimoine culturel immatériel de l’Unesco.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Sur le massif des Vosges, on défend la pratique agricole ancestrale de la transhumance. Les éleveurs alsaciens aimeraient bien la voir inscrite au patrimoine culturel immatériel de l’Unesco. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
